header.title: AI Assistant
header.subtitle: Describe the issue or send a photo to get a technician recommendation.

composer.imageNote: Image will be sent with the diagnosis request
composer.placeholderText: Ask FixIt AI about your problem...
composer.hintVoice: Voice message will be sent instead of text.
composer.hintText: Text can be empty for recommendations with an image or voice.

messages.intro: Tell me what is happening at home and I'll suggest the most suitable technician nearby.
messages.noRecommendations: No technicians are available from the AI response right now.

recommend.title: Results for: {{query}}
recommend.loadErrorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
recommend.emptyTitle: No technicians in your area yet
recommend.emptyMessage: Try a different description or expand your search area.

modeHint.recommendBody: Describe your problem or send a photo and I'll suggest the best technicians near you.
modeHint.agentBody: Tell me what's wrong and I'll prepare a complete service order for you automatically.
